overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit Japanese-inspired urban commercial district. The player character walks along wet streets under highway overpasses, passing traditional red lanterns, vending machines, and towering digital billboards while pedestrians and vehicles move through the scene.

ego steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking from the sidewalk onto the yellow crosswalk and crossing the intersection

car with headlights on approaching the intersection

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the street overhead
blue and pink neon hotel sign with Japanese text reading HOTEL
wide yellow striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection
vertical traffic signal showing red then changing to green
multi-story buildings with various neon advertisements and signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive highway overpass at night, approaching a yellow crosswalk. A neon hotel sign glows in the distance. The traffic light changes from red to green, and the player character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the street while a car approaches from the left.

illuminated blue and white vending machine with beverage display

segments.scene_description: Moving into a more enclosed walkway under the highway overpass, the scene features traditional Japanese elements including red paper lanterns and a food stall counter with green neon lighting. A vending machine stands on the left while the overpass structure looms overhead. The sidewalk is narrow with metal security shutters on closed shops.

events.description: passing by multiple pedestrians walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various shops and illuminated signage

pedestrian in vest walking in opposite direction

large illuminated digital advertisement screen on building facade
lit shop windows with visible merchandise and neon accents
trees with pink cherry blossoms visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens up slightly as the player passes various commercial storefronts with neon open signs and digital billboards. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the concrete sidewalk. Cherry blossom trees are visible in the distance, and the highway overpass recedes to the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with towering digital billboards and dense neon signage

crossing the road at the intersection while vehicles approach

white striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt

elevated highway ramp structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by towering digital billboards and skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The player crosses the white-striped crosswalk on wet asphalt that reflects the surrounding lights. A pedestrian with red hair crosses ahead while a car approaches with headlights blazing. The environment is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic including purple neon accents on building facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of a highway overpass into the overwhelming brilliance of a neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving across a yellow crosswalk toward a glowing hotel sign as traffic lights shift and cars pass by. As the camera enters a more enclosed walkway, the environment tightens into a narrow corridor of metal security shutters, red paper lanterns, and green-lit food stalls. The scene then opens up as the overpass recedes, passing commercial storefronts and digital billboards while pedestrians move past distant cherry blossom trees. Finally, the perspective emerges into a wide, wet intersection dominated by towering skyscrapers and purple neon advertisements, crossing the reflective asphalt toward a horizon of blazing headlights and massive digital displays.
